next_steps: Set access.nodes[0].ip on inventory/manual/systems/gitlab-a.json from query --live upstream_url.
Add a BIND forward A record for the gitlab.external_url hostname pointing at the CT IP.
Configure nginx-waf sites[] with proxy_pass to the CT HTTP upstream (http://<ct-ip>:80).
Sign in as root using the initial password from /etc/gitlab/initial_root_password inside the gitlab container (expires after 24h on first boot).
Change the root password and confirm signups_enabled matches config.
For Git over SSH, use ssh_host_port on the CT IP (default 2222) — nginx-waf proxies HTTP only.
